debug_info.goal:
u : Scalar52
h : u ≠ ZERO
⊢ ∃ m, u.as_montgomery = ok m ∧ Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ Scalar52_as_Nat u * R [MOD L] ∧ m ≠ ZERO

failed_attempts:
rcases as_montgomery_spec u with ⟨m, hm, hcong⟩
  refine ⟨m, hm, hcong, ?_⟩
  intro hzero
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    apply cancelR
    rw [← hcong, hzero]
    simp
  simp_all

obtain ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro h_zero
  rw [h_zero, Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO] at hspec
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := cancelR (by simpa using hspec.symm)
  exact h (Scalar52_as_Nat_eq_zero_iff.mp this)

obtain ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := spec_as_montgomery u
  refine ⟨m, hm, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro h_zero
  simp [h_zero, Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO] at hspec
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := cancelR hspec.symm
  exact h (eq_zero_of_mod_eq_zero this)

obtain ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro h_zero
  simp [h_zero, Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO] at hspec
  exact h (eq_zero_of_mod_eq_zero (cancelR hspec.symm))

obtain ⟨m, hm, h_val⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm, h_val, ?_⟩
  intro h_m_zero
  subst h_m_zero
  have h_val_zero : Scalar52_as_Nat ZERO = 0 := by simp [Scalar52_as_Nat, ZERO]
  rw [h_val_zero] at h_val
  have h_u_equiv : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := cancelR h_val.symm
  have h_u_zero : u = ZERO := eq_zero_of_equiv_zero h_u_equiv
  contradiction

obtain ⟨m, hm, h_val⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm, h_val, ?_⟩
  intro h_zero
  simp [h_zero, Scalar52.val_ZERO] at h_val
  apply h
  apply Scalar52.eq_zero_of_val_mod_eq_zero
  apply cancelR
  simpa using h_val.symm

obtain ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro hzero
  simp [hzero, Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO] at hspec
  apply h
  apply eq_ZERO_of_equiv_zero
  apply cancelR (b := 0)
  simpa using hspec.symm

obtain ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := spec_as_montgomery u
  refine ⟨m, hm, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro h_eq
  rw [h_eq] at hspec
  simp at hspec
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 * R [MOD L] := by simpa using hspec.symm
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := cancelR this
  simp [val_eq_zero_iff] at this
  contradiction

rcases as_montgomery_spec u with ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩
  refine ⟨m, hm, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro h_m_zero
  rw [h_m_zero, Scalar52.val_ZERO] at hspec
  have h_val_u : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := cancelR hspec
  have h_u_zero : u = ZERO := Scalar52.eq_zero_of_val_mod_eq_zero h_val_u
  contradiction

obtain ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro h_eq
  rw [h_eq, Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO] at hspec
  have h_equiv : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    apply cancelR
    simpa [Nat.mul_zero] using hspec.symm
  have h_zero : u = ZERO := Scalar52.eq_zero_of_modeq_zero h_equiv
  contradiction

obtain ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro h_eq
  rw [h_eq] at hspec
  simp only [Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO] at hspec
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 * R [MOD L] := by simpa using hspec.symm
  exact h (Scalar52_as_Nat_eq_zero_iff.mp (cancelR this))

have ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u

obtain ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := Spec_as_montgomery u

  have h_u_zero : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] :=

have ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro h_zero
  rw [h_zero, Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO] at hspec
  have h_val := cancelR (hspec.symm.trans (by simp))
  exact h (Scalar52_equiv_zero_iff_eq_ZERO.mp h_val)

obtain ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro h_zero
  apply h
  rw [Scalar52_as_Nat_eq_zero_iff]
  apply Nat.eq_zero_of_dvd_of_lt _ (Scalar52_as_Nat_lt_L u)
  apply Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero
  apply cancelR
  rw [zero_mul, Nat.ModEq.comm, hspec, h_zero, Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO]
  rfl

rcases spec_as_montgomery u with ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩
  refine ⟨m, hm, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro hzero
  have h_val : Scalar52_as_Nat m = 0 := by simp [hzero, Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO]
  have h_cong : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 * R [MOD L] := by
    rw [← hspec, h_val]
    simp
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := cancelR h_cong
  rw [Scalar52_as_Nat_eq_zero_iff] at h
  exact h this

  intro h_eq

obtain ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u

obtain ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := spec_as_montgomery u
  refine ⟨m, hm, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro hzero
  subst hzero
  simp only [spec_scalar52_zero] at hspec

  have : u = ZERO := spec_scalar52_eq_zero_of_mod_eq_zero this

have ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := spec_as_montgomery u
  refine ⟨m, hm, hspec, fun h_m_zero => ?_⟩
  have h_val : Scalar52_as_Nat m = 0 := by simp [h_m_zero, Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO]
  have h_cong : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 * R [MOD L] := by
    rw [←h_spec, h_val]
    simp
  have h_u_val : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := cancelR h_cong
  exact h (Scalar52_as_Nat_eq_zero_iff.mp h_u_val)

obtain ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_eq⟩ := spec_as_montgomery u
  refine ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_eq, ?_⟩
  intro h_zero
  subst h_zero
  simp only [spec_Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO] at hm_eq
  have h_cong : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := cancelR (by simpa using hm_eq.symm)
  have h_val : Scalar52_as_Nat u = 0 :=
    Nat.eq_zero_of_dvd_of_lt (Nat.ModEq.dvd h_cong) (spec_Scalar52_as_Nat_bound u)
  rw [spec_Scalar52_as_Nat_eq_zero_iff] at h_val
  contradiction

obtain ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := spec_as_montgomery u
  refine ⟨m, hm, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro h_zero
  rw [h_zero] at hspec
  simp only [val_ZERO] at hspec
  have h_cong : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 * R [MOD L] := by simpa using hspec.symm
  have h_val_zero : Scalar52_as_Nat u = 0 :=
    Nat.eq_zero_of_dvd_of_lt (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (cancelR h_cong)) (val_lt_L u)
  have : u = ZERO := val_inj _ _ (by simp [h_val_zero, val_ZERO])
  contradiction

have ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u

have ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  use m
  refine ⟨hm, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro h_m_zero
  simp [h_m_zero, Scalar52_as_Nat, ZERO] at hspec
  have h_u_val : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := cancelR (by simpa using hspec.symm)

    apply Scalar52.eq_zero_of_val_eq_zero

  rw [h_zero, Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO] at hspec
  have h_u : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := cancelR (by simpa using hspec.symm)
  exact h (Scalar52_eq_zero_of_equiv_zero h_u)

obtain ⟨m, hm, hspec⟩ := spec_as_montgomery u
  refine ⟨m, hm, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro h_eq
  simp [h_eq, Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO] at hspec
  have h_val : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := cancelR (by simpa using hspec.symm)
  have h_zero : u = ZERO := by

    exact Nat.eq_zero_of_dvd_of_lt (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero h_val) Scalar52_as_Nat_bound
  contradiction
